{{CargoRelic
|name=CEDAW
|class_id=22724
|rank=SSS
|affct=CIV
|birthday=07-13
|source=
|description=On Jul 13, 1979, the United Nations General Assembly adopted the Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination Against Women.<br>The Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination Against Women, commonly known as the Women's Rights Convention, aims to ensure basic human rights and equal status for women. It requires governments of various countries to actively take measures to eliminate discrimination against women in areas such as law, policy, society, and culture. The convention marks a significant milestone in the history of global women's rights and provides a legal framework and guidance for the comprehensive realization of women's rights.
|fame=74
|art=64
|fth=62
|civ=107
|tech=55
|ss1=Angel Minion RUSH +3%<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +30<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +9<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Angel Minion RUSH +4%<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +40<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +12<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Angel Minion RUSH +5%<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +50<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +15<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Angel Minion RUSH +7%<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +70<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +21<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss5=Angel Minion RUSH +9%<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +90<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +27<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss6=Angel Minion RUSH +12%<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +120<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +36<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Angel Minion RUSH +12%<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +120<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +36<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br>Per 60 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Forestsanctum skill III.png|50px]]Place in Forest Sanctum: This Relic's CIV +15
|skill2=[[File:Forestsanctum skill III.png|50px]]Place in Forest Sanctum: Forest Sanctum, Glorium Cap +30%
|skill3=[[File:Forestsanctum skill III.png|50px]]Place in Forest Sanctum: Forest Sanctum, Glorium Output +30%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Protecting women's rights and interests.|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Badge, +20|orange}}
|3name=Europe Women's Representative|3rec=206.01M|3atk=543503|3defense=333743|3hp=41670973|3weak=44405
|4name=Asia Women's Representative|4rec=363.45M|4atk=827261|4defense=489544|4hp=95815450|4weak=53743
|5name=Latin America Women's Representative|5rec=575.19M|5atk=1202803|5defense=680033|5hp=246548959|5weak=63665
|6name=Africa Women's Representative|6rec=778.28M|6atk=1565123|6defense=884210|6hp=446319610|6weak=76327
|Arec=919.35M|Aatk=1824792|Adefense=1035514|Ahp=634174027|Aweak=91426
}}}}
